text.title: Partner Swap Deal Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: swap deals fail same-specialty; find adjacent-specialty partner
reputation not verified; revisit at 12+ months

branch.when: partner_in_same_specialty == false AND partner_months_in_business >= 6 AND fee_policy == 'implicit'

conclusion.verdict: document fee-split before deal; never leave implicit

branch.when: partner_in_same_specialty == false AND partner_months_in_business >= 6 AND fee_policy != 'implicit'

conclusion.verdict: name scope + conflict-of-interest rule; wire annual audit

example.trace: partner_in_same_specialty == false AND partner_months_in_business >= 6 AND fee_policy != 'implicit' → conclusion ref="scope-named" verdict="name scope + conflict-of-interest rule; wire annual audit"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
